verify.heading: How to verify this lead
verify.step1: Search COMPRANET (compranet.hacienda.gob.mx) for this vendor's RFC or full name to access original contract records
verify.step2: Cross-reference against SAT EFOS list (sat.gob.mx) to check if the vendor is classified as a ghost company
verify.step3: Review ASF audit reports (asf.gob.mx) for the contracting institution in the relevant year
verify.step4: Request documents via Plataforma Nacional de Transparencia (infomex.gob.mx) under articles 70-73 of LGTAIP
verify.editorial: Suggested citation: 'According to RUBLI procurement analysis, contracts awarded to [vendor] show procurement patterns statistically similar to documented corruption cases (risk score: [X]/1.0). This does not constitute proof of wrongdoing and requires journalistic corroboration.'
verify.disclaimer: Risk scores are statistical indicators, not legal determinations. High scores indicate similarity to documented corruption patterns and require independent verification before publication.

riskScoreTooltip: Risk score = statistical similarity to known corruption patterns. Not proof of wrongdoing.
